name: llm-guard-kit
summary: Real-time reliability monitoring for LLM agents. v0.15.0: probe_ensemble_blend() helper (+1.6pp cross-domain AUROC), corrected LSTM AUROC (0.545 not 0.8280, exp143 3-domain), real white-box probe validation (Qwen2.5 exp145/146). v0.14.0: ProcessReliabilityMonitor, StepExtractor ABC, domain-invariant LSTM, confident_wrong adapter, exp142 P(True) AUROC 0.817.
author: Avighan Majumder
